subject: current_affairs
question: मार्च 2026 पासून महाराष्ट्राचे राज्यपाल म्हणून कोणाची नियुक्ती करण्यात आली आहे? / Who has been appointed as the Governor of Maharashtra since March 2026?
options: B. जिष्णु देव वर्मा / Jishnu Dev Varma
D. भगत सिंह कोश्यारी / Bhagat Singh Koshyari
explanation: Jishnu Dev Varma took over as Governor of Maharashtra from 10 March 2026, succeeding Acharya Devvrat.

subject: current_affairs
question: महाराष्ट्राचे विद्यमान मुख्य सचिव (Chief Secretary) कोण आहेत? / Who is the current Chief Secretary of Maharashtra?
explanation: Rajesh Agarwal was appointed as the new Chief Secretary of Maharashtra, succeeding Sujata Saunik.

subject: current_affairs
question: एप्रिल 2026 मध्ये महाराष्ट्र शासनाने प्रशासकीय सुविधेसाठी किती नवीन जिल्हे निर्माण करण्याची घोषणा केली? / In April 2026, how many new districts did the Maharashtra government announce for administrative convenience?
explanation: On 2 April 2026, the Maharashtra government approved the creation of 20 new districts and 81 new talukas to improve governance and citizen access.

subject: current_affairs
question: 2026-27 च्या महाराष्ट्र राज्याच्या अर्थसंकल्पाचा एकूण आकार सुमारे किती आहे आणि तो कोणी सादर केला? / What is the approximate size of Maharashtra's 2026-27 State Budget and who presented it?
options: A. अजित पवार, सुमारे ₹5 लाख कोटी / Ajit Pawar, around ₹5 lakh crore
B. देवेंद्र फडणवीस, सुमारे ₹7,69,467 कोटी / Devendra Fadnavis, around ₹7,69,467 crore
C. एकनाथ शिंदे, सुमारे ₹6 लाख कोटी / Eknath Shinde, around ₹6 lakh crore
D. सुनेत्रा पवार, सुमारे ₹8 लाख कोटी / Sunetra Pawar, around ₹8 lakh crore
explanation: CM and Finance Minister Devendra Fadnavis presented the Maharashtra Budget 2026-27 with a total outlay of about ₹7,69,467 crore, one of the largest in the state's history.

subject: current_affairs
question: 'मुख्यमंत्री बळीराजा मोफत वीज योजने' अंतर्गत किती अश्वशक्ती (HP) पर्यंतच्या कृषी पंपांना मोफत वीज दिली जाते? / Under the 'Chief Minister Baliraja Free Electricity Scheme', agricultural pumps up to how much horsepower (HP) get free electricity?
explanation: The scheme provides free electricity to agricultural pumps up to 7.5 HP, benefiting about 44 lakh farmers with relief worth ₹25,087 crore.

subject: current_affairs
question: आदिवासी महिलांच्या सक्षमीकरणासाठी महाराष्ट्र शासनाने कोणती नवीन योजना सुरू केली आहे? / Which new scheme has the Maharashtra government launched for empowerment of tribal women?
options: A. लेक लाडकी योजना / Lek Ladki Yojana
B. राणी दुर्गावती महिला सक्षमीकरण योजना / Rani Durgavati Women Empowerment Scheme
C. माझी कन्या भाग्यश्री / Majhi Kanya Bhagyashree
D. सावित्रीबाई फुले शिष्यवृत्ती / Savitribai Phule Scholarship
explanation: The 'Rani Durgavati Women Empowerment Scheme' has been launched specifically for tribal women in Maharashtra.

subject: current_affairs
question: मराठी भाषेला अभिजात भाषेचा दर्जा कोणत्या तारखेला केंद्र सरकारने मंजूर केला, जो आता 'मराठी अभिजात भाषा दिन' म्हणून साजरा केला जातो? / On which date did the Central Government approve classical language status for Marathi, now observed as 'Marathi Abhijaat Bhasha Divas'?
explanation: The Union Cabinet granted classical language status to Marathi on 3 October 2024, and Maharashtra now observes 3 October as Marathi Abhijaat Bhasha Divas.

subject: current_affairs
question: नाशिक-त्र्यंबकेश्वर सिंहस्थ कुंभमेळा 2026 कोणत्या तारखेला ध्वजारोहणाने सुरू होणार आहे? / On which date does the Nashik-Trimbakeshwar Simhastha Kumbh Mela 2026 begin with the traditional flag-hoisting (dhwajarohan)?
explanation: The Simhastha Kumbh Mela officially begins on 31 October 2026 with dhwajarohan at Trimbakeshwar, Ramkund and Panchavati, and continues till 24 July 2028.

subject: current_affairs
question: छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या राज्याभिषेकाचा 350 वा वर्धापन दिन कोणत्या किल्ल्यावर साजरा करण्यात आला? / At which fort was the 350th anniversary celebration of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj's coronation held?
explanation: The 350th anniversary celebrations of Shivaji Maharaj's coronation (Shiv Rajyabhishek) began at Raigad fort, attended by the CM and Deputy CM.

subject: current_affairs
question: 2026 च्या महाराष्ट्र विधान परिषद निवडणुकीत महायुतीने एकूण किती जागांपैकी किती जागा जिंकल्या? / In the 2026 Maharashtra Legislative Council (Vidhan Parishad) elections, how many seats out of the total did the Mahayuti alliance win?
explanation: Across Maharashtra, the Mahayuti alliance won 16 out of 17 Vidhan Parishad seats in the 2026 elections, including several uncontested wins.

subject: current_affairs
question: खेलो इंडिया युथ गेम्स 2025 मध्ये सर्वाधिक पदकांसह अव्वल स्थान कोणत्या राज्याने पटकावले? / Which state topped the medal tally at the Khelo India Youth Games (KIYG) 2025?
explanation: Maharashtra topped the KIYG 2025 medal table with 158 medals (58 gold, 47 silver, 53 bronze), retaining its title for a fifth consecutive time.

subject: current_affairs
question: मुंबई ट्रान्स हार्बर लिंक (अटल सेतू) संबंधित उलवे कोस्टल रोड प्रकल्पाचा पहिला टप्पा कधीपर्यंत पूर्ण होणे अपेक्षित आहे? / By when is Phase 1 of the Ulwe Coastal Road project (linked to Atal Setu / Mumbai Trans Harbour Link) expected to be completed?
explanation: Phase 1 of the Ulwe Coastal Road, which complements the Atal Setu, is scheduled to be completed by July 2026, with full completion targeted by September-November 2026.
